title: kaempferia noctiflora
intro: Kaempferia noctiflora, also known as Krachai Dam or Midnight Lily, is a type of plant in the ginger family that is native to Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Kaempferia noctiflora include its ability to improve circulation, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. Kaempferia noctiflora is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, to promote overall health and well-being.
